query:
-- Hunter usage by day last 14 days
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as verifications,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'deliverable' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deliverable,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'undeliverable' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as undeliverable,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'risky' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as risky,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'unknown' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unknown_result
FROM hunterVerificationLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY day DESC;
